title: US strikes Iranian fast boats as Iran attacks UAE oil facility
description: Shipping company Maersk says one of its US-flagged commercial vessels has successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz under US military protection.

title: The most talked-about looks at this year's Met Gala
description: The theme for 2026 Met Gala fundraiser is "Costume Art", exploring fashion as an embodied art form.

title: Wyoming lawmakers use pro-natalist arguments to justify proposed new partial abortion ban
description: Wyoming lawmakers say tight new restrictions on abortion are needed to grow the state's population. Demographers and others say economic conditions are more to blame for an exodus of young people.

title: As Oil Prices Stay High, China Doubles Down on Wind Power
description: An industrial policy of subsidies and import restrictions laid the foundations for China to become almost as dominant in wind turbines as in solar panels.

title: Taiwan Could Learn From Ukraine. Informally, Connections Are Growing.
description: The governments have no official diplomatic or military ties. But a loose network led by company executives and volunteers is bridging some of that gulf.

title: White Sox Can’t Trade Munetaka Murakami at the Deadline — Here’s Why
description: The Chicago White Sox could get a king's ransom from a team for slugger Munetaka Murakami. But they shouldn't. Here's why.

title: Explosion at a fireworks plant in China kills at least 21 people, injures dozens more: report
description: An explosion at a fireworks factory in in China's Hunan province killed at least 21 people and injured 61 others, according to state media reports.

title: Knicks’ unstoppable four-game run has led to tempting question
description: At what point is it OK to believe? At what point can you trust your eyes, which are beginning to make some bold proclamations if you let them.

title: Daniel Baldwin accuses Jimmy Kimmel of fueling ‘hatred’ toward Trump after White House dinner shooting
description: Baldwin referenced Johnny Carson's response to the 1981 Reagan assassination attempt as a contrast to today's climate.

title: Miami’s Super Bowl drought set to hit a decade over ‘requirements and demands’ issue
description: Miami hasn't hosted the Super Bowl since 2020 and isn’t slated to host for the next three years, meaning it'll go without one for a decade.

title: Mikal Bridges’ Knicks resurgence looks like more than a fluke after Game 1
description: Was it a one-game anomaly? Or the start of a turnaround? Based on Monday night, it could be the latter for Mikal Bridges.
